Important Dates & Deadlines

new_releases

Religious Accommodations Notice

Western provides reasonable accommodation for students to take holidays for reasons of faith or conscience or for organized activities conducted under the auspices of a religious denomination, church, or religious organization. Navigate to the Religious Accommodations policy on the University Catalog to learn more.

Important Dates & Deadlines

Start of Quarter
Date Event
Tue, Jan 6 First Day of Classes
Registration
Date Event
Tue, Nov 4 - Mon, Nov 17 Phase I - registration for continuing, new transfer, and post-baccalaureate students - students can register for up to 18 credits max
Tue, Nov 18 - Mon, Jan 5 Phase II - 8:30 a.m. - registration for continuing, new transfer, and post-baccalaureate students - students can register for up to 20 credits max
Tue, Jan 6 - Mon, Jan 12 Phase III - open registration - students can register for up to 20 credits max - waitlisting hours change from 24 to 12 hours
Last Day Deadlines
Date Event
Fri, Oct 3 Last day to apply for a bachelor's degree (before late fee applies)
Wed, Nov 5 Priority date for readmission after being away one quarter or longer other than summer quarter
Mon, Jan 5 Last day to apply for graduate degree
Tue, Jan 6 Tuition and fees, housing and meal plan charges due
Mon, Jan 12 Waitlisting ends at 11:59 p.m.
Mon, Jan 12 Last day to change to-or-from Audit
Mon, Jan 12 Last day to withdraw with full refund (ends at 11:59 p.m.)
Mon, Jan 12 Last day to add a class without an override
Thu, Jan 15 Last day to pay account before late payment charges are assessed
Sun, Jan 18 Last day to withdraw from a class without incurring a "W" grade on official transcript ("XM" code appears on unofficial academic history only)
Sun, Jan 18 Last day to add or drop a class without incurring a $10 per credit late fee
Sun, Feb 1 Last day to change to-or-from Pass/No Pass
Wed, Feb 4 Last day for half-tuition refund when dropping a class (fees are not refunded)
Fri, Feb 13 Last day to apply for a Bachelor's degree (late fees apply)
Sun, Feb 22 Last day to withdraw from a class. Online registration via Web4U ends at 11:59 p.m.
Sun, Mar 8 Last day to withdraw from WWU - for winter quarter only
End of Quarter
Date Event
Mon, Mar 16 - Fri, Mar 20 Final Exams
Holidays
Date Event
Mon, Jan 19 Martin Luther King Jr. Day
Mon, Feb 16 Presidents Day
Sat, Mar 21 - Mon, Mar 30 Spring Break

516 High Street
Old Main 230 MS 9008
Bellingham, WA 98225-9008

Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
